event: ingestion of two fresh tablets of Celphos (AlP)
intravenous magnesium sulphate 1 gm stat and 8 hourly
intravenous hydrocortisone 100 mg stat and 12 hourly
immediate gastric lavage with potassium permanganate (KMnO4)
activated charcoal was kept in the stomach, repeated 8 hourly
routine investigations were normal at admission
arterial blood gas analysis showed a metabolic acidosis
metabolic acidosis correction was performed as per the protocol
shifted to an intensive care unit (ICU)
blood pressure was ranging from 70/50 mmHg to 90/60 mmHg till the fourth day
IV amiodarone infusion continued till the next 48 hours
normal sinus rhythm maintained till discharge
ventricular ectopic beat after the DC cardio-version
total leucocyte count 14000/mm3 with polymorphonuclear leucocytosis
urine output improved to around 1200 ml/24 hours
shifted to a step down unit (SDU)
